description: Acknowledgment of a debt of 10 dinars contracted by […] b. ʿAlī, an inhabitant of the ‘residence of the bishop’ (sakn al-qissīs), owed to Abū l-Ḥasan b. Asad b. Ismāʿīl the Jew. The sum must be repaid in 4 monthly installments of 1/4 of a dinar each. Dated: Rabīʿ II 519 AH, which is 1125 CE. On verso there is Hebrew text. (Information from CUDL and Khan)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
